sql.trim: t1.ID, t1.CONTRACT_ID, t1.SIGN_ID, t1.SIGN_NAME, t1.SIGN_PARTIES, t1.SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC, t1.SIGN_CONTRACT_NO, t1.SIGN_CONTACTS, t1.SIGN_TEL, t1.ORDER_NUM, t1.ORDER_NUM_ZHMC, t1.YN_TRANSACTION, t1.YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC, t1.EDIT_FLAG, t1.SECRET_LEVEL, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.OPERATION_TYPE_, t1.SYS_APPLICATION_ID, t1.LOG_APP_ID, t1.UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE, t1.UNIT_ATTRIBUTE, t1.SUPPLIER_NAME

mapper.insert:
insert into CMJT_SIGN_INFO
ID,
CONTRACT_ID,
SIGN_ID,
SIGN_NAME,
SIGN_PARTIES,
SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC,
SIGN_CONTRACT_NO,
SIGN_CONTACTS,
SIGN_TEL,
ORDER_NUM,
ORDER_NUM_ZHMC,
YN_TRANSACTION,
YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC,
EDIT_FLAG,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE_,
SECRET_LEVEL,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{contractId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signPartiesZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signContractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signContacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{signTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orderNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orderNumZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynTransaction,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ynTransactionZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{editFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into CMJT_SIGN_INFO( ID , CONTRACT_ID , SIGN_ID , SIGN_NAME , SIGN_PARTIES , SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC , SIGN_CONTRACT_NO , SIGN_CONTACTS , SIGN_TEL , ORDER_NUM , ORDER_NUM_ZHMC , YN_TRANSACTION , YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC , EDIT_FLAG , CREATED_BY , CREATED_DEPT , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ORG_IDENTITY , SYS_APPLICATION_ID , VERSION , OPERATION_TYPE_ , SECRET_LEVEL )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.contractId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signPartiesZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signContractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signContacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.signTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orderNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orderNumZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynTransaction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ynTransactionZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.editFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update CMJT_SIGN_INFO
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_ID = #{signId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_NAME = #{signName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_PARTIES = #{signParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC = #{signPartiesZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_CONTRACT_NO = #{signContractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_CONTACTS = #{signContacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_TEL = #{signTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORDER_NUM_ZHMC = #{orderNumZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_TRANSACTION = #{ynTransaction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC = #{ynTransactionZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
EDIT_FLAG = #{editFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update CMJT_SIGN_INFO set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CONTRACT_ID = #{item.contractId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_ID = #{item.signId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_NAME = #{item.signName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_PARTIES = #{item.signParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC = #{item.signPartiesZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_CONTRACT_NO = #{item.signContractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_CONTACTS = #{item.signContacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SIGN_TEL = #{item.signTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORDER_NUM = #{item.orderNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORDER_NUM_ZHMC = #{item.orderNumZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_TRANSACTION = #{item.ynTransaction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC = #{item.ynTransactionZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EDIT_FLAG = #{item.editFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.delete:
delete from CMJT_SIGN_INFO where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO CMJT_SIGN_INFO t1 USING dual ON(t1.ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_ID = #{signId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_NAME = #{signName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_PARTIES = #{signParties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC = #{signPartiesZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_CONTRACT_NO = #{signContractNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_CONTACTS = #{signContacts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SIGN_TEL = #{signTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORDER_NUM_ZHMC = #{orderNumZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_TRANSACTION = #{ynTransaction,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC = #{ynTransactionZhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
EDIT_FLAG = #{editFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE = #{unifiedSocialCreditCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UNIT_ATTRIBUTE = #{unitAttribute,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
ID,
CONTRACT_ID,
SIGN_ID,
SIGN_NAME,
SIGN_PARTIES,
SIGN_PARTIES_ZHMC,
SIGN_CONTRACT_NO,
SIGN_CONTACTS,
SIGN_TEL,
ORDER_NUM,
ORDER_NUM_ZHMC,
YN_TRANSACTION,
YN_TRANSACTION_ZHMC,
EDIT_FLAG,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE_,
SECRET_LEVEL,
UNIFIED_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE,
UNIT_ATTRIBUTE,
SUPPLIER_NAME,
